query: top 3 smartphones in 2025, compare pricing across US marketplaces
answer_text: Here are three of the strongest smartphones in 2025 with US marketplace pricing. The Apple iPhone 16 is the best all-around pick at a $799 starting price, the Samsung Galaxy S25 is the top Android flagship at $799.99, and the Google Pixel 9a is the best value at $499. On the used market the Galaxy S25 averages around $469 while the iPhone 16 averages around $613, making the Samsung the cheaper flagship on resale and the Pixel 9a the lowest-cost option overall at launch. If you want a tighter retail-by-retail view I can break out Amazon, Best Buy, and Walmart pricing separately.
